events.title: 2026 Herb Caen Lecture: Press Freedom in Peril
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Graduate School of Journalism
events.location: North Gate Hall Logan Multimedia Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: A timely conversation with Jodie Ginsberg, Jason Rezaian, and Emilio Garcia-Ruiz discussing threats to press independence, with a reception at 5:30 p.m. prior to the main event.

events.title: Dissertation Talk: Interpreting and Controlling Generative Models
events.location: Berkeley Way West, 8th Floor Lunch Room, UC Berkeley
events.description: A dissertation talk on understanding and controlling generative AI models.

events.title: What is Data Art?
events.organizer: EECS at Berkeley (Human Technology Futures colloquium series)
events.description: This colloquium introduces Berkeley faculty at the heart of Human Technology Futures research, exploring the intersection of data and art.

events.title: EECS Colloquium | Causal Inference and Decompositions using AI Models: Statistical Theory and Applications to Worker Transitions
events.description: This colloquium adapts causal inference tools to problems involving sequence data like worker careers and applies methods to estimate gender wage gaps.

events.title: Moving Inland: Coastal and Mountain Landscapes in Cyprus' Hunter-Gatherer Past
events.description: A lecture on early human movement, landscape use, and initial island colonization in Cyprus.

events.title: Arbitraging China's platform economy in the Silicon Savannah
events.description: A discussion on China's platform economy and its implications in the 'Silicon Savannah.'

events.title: Ableism When Accessing the Past: Studies of Disability in the Ancient World (Hannah Vogel)
events.description: A lecture by Hannah Vogel on studies of disability in the ancient world.

events.title: Layli Long Soldier: Poetry Reading
events.description: A poetry reading by acclaimed poet Layli Long Soldier.

events.title: CLIMB Voleon Seminar with Susan Murphy
events.organizer: Center for the Theoretical Foundations of Learning, Inference, Information, Intelligence, Mathematics, and Microeconomics at Berkeley (CLIMB)
events.description: A two-day seminar discussing the replicability of statistical analyses from trials deploying adaptive treatment assignment algorithms.

events.title: Ergodic Schrodinger Operators Learning Seminar: Complex conjugacies
events.description: A learning seminar continuing the presentation of A. Avila's resolution of almost reducible conjecture.

events.title: Graduate Student Appreciation Patio Party
events.organizer: Graduate Social Club and the Grad Division, UC Berkeley
events.description: An event for graduate students to enjoy tasty bites and socialize.

events.title: Tibor Szilvasi: Enabling the Next Level of Understanding in Heterogeneous Catalysis Using Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
events.description: A seminar on using machine learning for understanding heterogeneous catalysis.

events.title: Lunch Poems: Tonya Foster
events.description: A poetry reading as part of the 'Lunch Poems' series.

events.title: Language and Colonial Legacies in Portuguese Higher Education
events.description: A lecture on language and colonial legacies in Portuguese higher education, focusing on Brazilian and African Portuguese-speaking students.

events.title: Robert Habeck and Andrea Paluch | Writing Together - How We Did It
events.description: A talk by Robert Habeck and Andrea Paluch on their collaborative writing process.

events.title: Layli Long Soldier & Solmaz Sharif: A Conversation
events.description: A conversation between acclaimed poets Layli Long Soldier and Solmaz Sharif.

events.title: Aerospace Seminar (José Hernández)
events.location: Jarvis Auditorium, Grimes Engineering Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: An inspiring afternoon welcoming astronaut José Hernández for an aerospace seminar.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Prof. Matt Eichenfield
events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: This seminar explores realizing phononic amplifiers, lasers, and other components by engineering electron-phonon interactions.

events.title: Drive-Thru USA - Spatial Analysis, Car-Centricity, and Sprawl Design in America (ITS Transportation Seminar)
events.organizer: Institute of Transportation Studies (ITS), UC Berkeley
events.description: Marcel Moran will present on spatial analysis, car-centricity, and sprawl design in America, with a cookie hour at 2:30 p.m. in the ITS Library.

events.title: Cal Football Coaches Clinic
events.description: A clinic for football coaches to improve their skills and strategies.

events.title: UC Berkeley Chamber Chorus and University Chorus featuring UCBSO (Performance 1)
events.description: A performance by the UC Berkeley Chamber Chorus, University Chorus, and UCBSO.

events.title: UC Berkeley Chamber Chorus and University Chorus featuring UCBSO (Performance 2)
events.description: A second performance by the UC Berkeley Chamber Chorus, University Chorus, and UCBSO.

events.title: Hunt for “Dinosaur” Eggs: 32nd Annual Egg Hunt and Learning Festival
events.description: A fun, free educational event with activity booths, performances, and egg hunts for young children to encourage higher education.

events.title: Power in Community Day
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Office of Undergraduate Admissions
events.description: An on-campus event designed to celebrate and support underrepresented, low-income, and first-generation first-year admitted students.

events.title: UC LAUNCH Spring 2026 LAUNCHATHON
events.description: A two-day hackathon weekend event filled with workshops and networking where students help UC LAUNCH Startups build their ideas.

events.title: Tacet(i) Ensemble
events.location: Wu Performance Hall (Morrison Hall, Room 125), UC Berkeley
events.description: A public concert featuring new works by UC Berkeley graduate student composers.

events.title: Women's Water Polo MPSF Championship Tournament
events.description: The 30th edition of the MPSF Women's Water Polo Championship Tournament, hosted by UC Berkeley. Games run from April 10-12.

events.title: Freestyle Swim Clinic
events.description: A focused clinic to help swimmers develop easy and efficient side breathing techniques for freestyle.

events.title: Crafter Dark – DIY Shirt Patches
events.location: 1st Floor of MLK Jr. Building, Game Zone Area, UC Berkeley
events.description: A crafting event for students to make their own DIY shirt patches, hosted in partnership with Cub Concerts at Berkeley.

events.title: Movie Night (Legally Blonde)
events.description: An enjoyable evening screening of the charming and empowering film 'Legally Blonde' for UC Berkeley students.

events.title: New Admit Campus Walking Tours (Spring 2026)
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Office of Undergraduate Admissions
events.description: In-person campus walking tours led by student ambassadors for newly admitted students and families, providing insights into campus life.

events.title: Community Day (ASUC Student Union)
events.description: An event to explore community service student organizations on campus.

events.title: Drag Bingo (ASUC Student Union)
events.description: An unforgettable night filled with laughter, prizes, and treats hosted by Thee Leggy Pee.

events.title: Spring Semester De-Stress Fest (ASUC Student Union)
events.location: MLK 1st Floor Game Zone, UC Berkeley
events.description: An event for students to unwind and recharge before exams.

events.title: Cal Day
events.location: California Memorial Stadium and various campus locations, UC Berkeley
events.description: Annual admitted student event welcoming new students and families, featuring academic departments, campus resources, student life, and performances.

events.title: Golden Bear Welcome
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Office of Undergraduate Admissions
events.description: UC Berkeley's exclusive on-campus event for newly admitted transfer students and their families to help with their transition.

events.title: Entrepreneurship and Innovation Seminar (Geoffrey Borchhardt)
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Haas, Entrepreneurship & Innovation Group
events.location: C110 Cheit Hall, UC Berkeley Haas
events.description: A seminar presentation by Geoffrey Borchhardt on entrepreneurship and innovation.

events.title: Entrepreneurship and Innovation Seminar (Samuel Goldberg)
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Haas, Entrepreneurship & Innovation Group
events.location: C110 Cheit Hall, UC Berkeley Haas
events.description: A seminar presentation by Samuel Goldberg on entrepreneurship and innovation.

events.title: Entrepreneurship and Innovation Seminar (Lee Fleming + Saqib Chou)
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Haas, Entrepreneurship & Innovation Group
events.location: C110 Cheit Hall, UC Berkeley Haas
events.description: A seminar presentation by Lee Fleming and Saqib Chou on entrepreneurship and innovation.

events.title: UC LAUNCH Spring 2026 DEMO DAY
events.description: An event to see the next wave of entrepreneurs shaping the future as startup finalists pitch for prizes.

events.title: Robotics & AI Conference

events.location: Spieker Forum, Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.description: A conference focusing on advancements and discussions in robotics and artificial intelligence.

events.title: Deep Tech Innovation Lab Demo Day
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Haas, Institute for Business Innovation
events.description: A demo day showcasing innovations from the Deep Tech Innovation Lab.

events.organizer: UC Berkeley Haas, Institute for Business Innovation
events.description: An event related to the aerospace industry.

events.location: Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.description: The Summer Institute in Competitive Strategy offers insights into strategic business practices.
